description_long: This object is a shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a long, matte-black barrel and a solid wooden stock. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from metal, with visible mechanical details such as a pump mechanism and mounting hardware. The stock and fore-end are made of dark-stained wood, providing a classic contrast to the metal components. The shotgun has a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel, and the action appears to be pump-operated, as indicated by the ribbed fore-end. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing the trigger securely. Overall, the shotgun is designed for practical use, with a focus on durability and functionality.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte-black metal barrel and dark wooden stock, featuring a ribbed fore-end and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the stock behind it.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the barrel, the wooden stock, and the ribbed pump fore-end beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: The shotgun is seen from the rear, highlighting the end of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the same key features as view 1, including the metal receiver, wooden stock, and pump fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
